This is a file from the Wikimedia Commons. Information from its description page there is shown below.
Commons is a freely licensed media file repository. You can help.
Summary
DescriptionSachsenring.svg
English: Track map of Sachsenring. No pit area for the "Omega Circuit" (the right half of the image) was found.This map was created from OpenStreetMap project data, collected by the community. This map may be incomplete, and may contain errors. Don't rely solely on it for navigation.
SVG development
InfoField
The SVG code is valid.
This map was created with Inkscape.
Date
8-6-2008
Source
openstreetmap.org
Creator
Will Pittenger
Own workOpenStreetMap contributors
